summary: Backend-only audit completed for Telegram menu hierarchy/callback wiring/slippage migration plus runtime probes. lint/build passed; runtime_backend_regression, worker_timeout_probe, live_execution_hardening_probe, execution_summary_failed_probe, telegram_menu_navigation_probe, and added telegram_slippage_confirmation_probe all passed. Exchange and Telegram transport in probes are MOCKED.
action_items: Keep telegram_slippage_confirmation_probe.ts in CI to guard warning+confirmation flow when input exceeds 150 bps.
Keep telegram_menu_navigation_probe.ts as regression gate for callback reachability and 7-category structure.
critical_code_review_comments: executionEngine.ts is still very large (>700 lines), mixing submit/reconcile/summary concerns; split modules to reduce regression blast radius.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Isolated DATA_DIR under /tmp used per probe run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed and passed: yarn lint && yarn build; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-reg LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-reg/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-reg/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/runtime_backend_regression.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-timeout LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-timeout/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-timeout/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/worker_timeout_probe.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-live LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-live/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-live/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/live_execution_hardening_probe.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-failed LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-failed/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-failed/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/execution_summary_failed_probe.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-menu LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-menu/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-menu/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/telegram_menu_navigation_probe.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-slip LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-slip/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it8-slip/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/telegram_slippage_confirmation_probe.ts. MOCKED integrations: FakeLiveIndodaxClient/FakeLiveOrderApi/FakeIndodaxClient and fake Telegram bot context harness.
rca of the issue: No blocking bug reproduced in this run. RCA focus points validated: NAV namespace callbacks parse and route without conflict, each tested submenu callback is supported by handler switch, buy slippage default/legacy migration normalizes 25->60 and 80->150, and >150 input triggers warning then safe cap confirmation path (LANJUT => set 150, alternate numeric input => apply alternate value).
